meta.title: AlphaNodes — No-Code Backtesting
meta.description: Build and backtest trading strategies with drag-and-drop blocks. No coding required.

hero.description: Just drag and connect blocks to build SMA crossover, RSI oversold strategies, and more — then instantly view backtest results.

dragAndDrop.title: Drag & Drop Blocks
dragAndDrop.description: Visually compose strategies by combining indicator blocks like SMA, RSI, MACD without any code.

accurateBacktest.title: Accurate Backtesting
accurateBacktest.description: Realistic simulation with fees and slippage to verify actual strategy performance.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.description: View key metrics like MDD, Sharpe ratio, win rate, and profit factor at a glance.
